trades.reasoning: Top-ranked screener score (95) with RSI in the bullish momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, and price well above SMA-20 — all four signals aligned, rare quality.
Score 90 with RSI 62.9 in healthy bullish zone and MACD crossover confirmed; neutral-to-positive market day supports continued momentum without overbought risk.

decisions.briefing: Markets posted a quiet positive session today — NASDAQ up 0.5% and S&P 500 up 0.6% — suggesting underlying demand without overheating. With 4 open slots and $843 in cash, I'm deploying into CMPR (the strongest screener candidate with all four signals aligned) and TSLA (solid momentum, not overbought). Existing holdings look healthy and no stop-loss triggers are visible, so no sells today.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted modest gains on May 22 as the S&P 500 rose 0.6% and the NASDAQ added 0.5%, reflecting a broadly neutral risk environment with no major macro catalysts dominating sentiment. Technology and consumer discretionary names led, consistent with improving earnings visibility and easing rate-cut expectations supporting growth assets. The muted but positive tone suggests institutional buyers are selectively adding exposure rather than making aggressive directional bets.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市5月22日小幅收高，標普500指數上漲0.6%，納斯達克指數上升0.5%，整體市場情緒中性偏正面，缺乏明確的宏觀催化因素主導走勢。科技股與非必需消費品板塊表現相對突出，反映市場對企業盈利前景的信心有所改善，同時降息預期的支撐亦令成長型資產吸引力維持。整體成交溫和，顯示機構資金以選擇性佈局為主，並非大規模追漲。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already rising, on the theory that winners tend to keep winning in the short term. Traders use signals like RSI (measuring how fast a stock has risen), MACD (trend direction), and price vs. moving average to confirm that momentum is real and not yet exhausted. Today's top buys — CMPR and TSLA — were chosen precisely because all their momentum signals are pointing up without crossing into overbought territory.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資（Momentum Investing）是指買入已在上漲的股票，其背後邏輯是「強者恆強」——短期內表現優異的股票往往持續跑贏。投資者通常以RSI（衡量漲勢速度）、MACD（趨勢方向）及價格對移動平均線的關係來確認動能是否真實且尚未過熱。今日選入的CMPR與TSLA，正是因為多項動能指標同時看多，且尚未進入超買區間，才成為優先建倉的對象。
